title: SECURITIES AND INVESTMENT MANAGER
description:
Responsibilities
●     Analyze companyfinancial statements to evaluate performance, identify risks, and proposeoptimization opportunities.
(分析公司财务报表，评估经营表现，识别风险并提出优化改进建议。)

●     Conduct industryresearch on policy, market, competition, and technology trends to supportstrategic decisions.
(开展行业研究，跟踪政策、市场、竞争格局及技术趋势，为战略决策提供支持。)

●     Applyprofessional financial analysis methods to uncover operational issues anddeliver actionable insights.
(运用专业的财务分析方法，挖掘经营层面的潜在问题并提出可执行的改进方案。)

●     Supportportfolio management and ongoing performance monitoring.
(支持投资组合管理及持续的绩效监控。)

●     Assist ininvestment strategy formulation, risk analysis, and decision-making.
(协助制定投资策略，进行风险评估并支持投资决策。)

●     Preparehigh-quality investment reports, proposals, and presentations.
(准备高质量的投资分析报告、方案及演示材料。)

●     Participate indeal structuring and execution for M&A and direct investments.
(参与并支持并购及直接投资项目的交易结构设计与执行。)

Skills & Competencies

●     Stronganalytical and quantitative skills
(具备较强的分析能力和数量分析能力。)

●     Knowledge offinancial markets, instruments, and valuation methods
(熟悉金融市场、金融工具及估值方法。)

●     Goodcommunication, presentation, and reporting abilities
(具备良好的沟通、演示及报告撰写能力。)

●     Detail-orientedand able to work independently or in a team
(注重细节，能够独立工作，也能良好地进行团队协作。)

●     Excellentability to interpret financial data of listed companies and analyze industrydevelopment trends
(具备出色的上市公司财务数据解读能力及行业发展趋势分析能力。)

●       Capable of effectivelyassisting investment consultants in decision-making by leveraging professionalknowledge and enthusiasm for securities and listing processes

(能够凭借专业知识及对证券、上市流程的热忱，有效协助投资咨询顾问进行决策。)

Minimum Qualifications

●     Master’s degree,Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy, Finance, Economics, or a related field
(拥有硕士学位，或会计、金融、经济学及相关专业的本科学位。)

●     Those withprofessional qualifications such as CFA, MBA, CPA, CMA are preferred
(持有 CFA、MBA、CPA、CMA 等专业资格者优先考虑。)

●     Fluency inMandarin and English, including strong written, reading, and spokencommunication skills, is required for this role.
(该岗位要求精通中英文，具备优秀的听、说、读、写能力。)

Relevant Work Experience

●     Experience ininvestment management in a formal employment capacity, and
(具备在正式雇佣岗位中的投资管理相关工作经验，和)

●     Experience indeal structuring for mergers & acquisitions, particularly for candidatesfocusing on private equity, venture capital, or direct investments
(具备并购交易结构设计经验，尤其适用于专注于私募股权、风险投资或直接投资方向的候选人。)

postedCompany.description:
Grandbull Network Technology, part of the Dojane Capital Group, is a next-generation investment advisory firm focused on deep technology, artificial intelligence (AI), and emerging digital asset ecosystems.


We are committed to supporting our investment teams with accurate, efficient, and transparent administrative and operational processes, ensuring smooth execution of investment strategies across public and private markets.

Grandbull Network Technology 隶属于 Dojane Capital Group（道杰资本集团），是一家专注于深度科技、人工智能（AI）以及新兴数字资产生态系统的新一代投资顾问公司。

我们致力于为投资团队提供精准、高效且透明的行政与运营支持，以确保在公开市场与私募市场中的各类投资策略能够顺利执行、稳健落地。
postedCompany.name: GRANDBULL NETWORK TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
